title: carex pirinensis
intro: Carex pirinensis, also known as Pirin sedge, is a species of sedge that belongs to the family Cyperaceae. It is a perennial herb native to the Pirin Mountains in Bulgaria, known for its medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Carex pirinensis include reducing inflammation, fighting off oxidative stress, and potentially lowering blood pressure, and it can be prepared as a herbal tea or infusion.
